event: Peter the Great Meditating the Idea of Building St. Petersburg
description: A horizontal landscape painting depicting a solitary figure standing on a windswept Baltic shoreline, looking out over rough gray-green waters toward a distant low island. The figure wears 18th-century clothing and holds a walking stick. Behind him to the right, another figure holds a horse. The sky is dramatic, painted in intense golden-yellow tones suggesting either sunrise or storm light. The beach is sandy with tufts of wind-bent grass in the foreground. The sea is choppy with visible whitecaps. The overall atmosphere is one of solitude and contemplation before a vast, wild landscape.

_meta.title: Peter the Great meditating the Idea of building St. Petersburg at the Shore of the Baltic Sea
